compressed_prompt: Create a table with a 7 day trip itinerary for India, and a 7 day trip itinerary for China. Separate them with exactly 6 asterisks symbols: *******
response:
Certainly! Below are the 7-day trip itineraries for India and China:

*********

### 7-Day Trip Itinerary for India

| Day   | Activity/Destination                  | Description                                                                                     |
|-------|---------------------------------------|-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|
| Day 1 | Arrive in Delhi                       | Explore Old Delhi, visit Jama Masjid, and enjoy street food in Chandni Chowk.                     |
| Day 2 | Agra                                  | Visit the Taj Mahal and Agra Fort.                                                              |
| Day 3 | Jaipur                                | Explore Amber Fort, City Palace, and Hawa Mahal.                                                 |
| Day 4 | Udaipur                               | Visit City Palace, Lake Pichola, and Jag Mandir.                                                 |
| Day 5 | Jodhpur                               | Explore Mehrangarh Fort and visit local markets.                                                |
| Day 6 | Varanasi                              | Experience a boat ride on the Ganges River and visit Sarnath.                                    |
| Day 7 | Mumbai                                | Visit Gateway of India, Marine Drive, and explore local street markets.                         |

*********

### 7-Day Trip Itinerary for China

| Day   | Activity/Destination                  | Description                                                                                     |
|-------|---------------------------------------|-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|
| Day 1 | Arrive in Beijing                     | Visit the Great Wall of China and the Forbidden City.                                           |
| Day 2 | Beijing                               | Explore the Temple of Heaven and the Summer Palace.                                             |
| Day 3 | Xi'an                                 | Visit the Terracotta Warriors and the ancient city wall.                                        |
| Day 4 | Shanghai                              | Explore The Bund, Yu Garden, and Nanjing Road.                                                   |
| Day 5 | Hangzhou                              | Visit West Lake and Lingyin Temple.                                                             |
| Day 6 | Chengdu                              | Visit the Giant Panda Breeding Research Center and explore Jinli Ancient Street.                 |
| Day 7 | Guilin                                | Take a boat tour on the Li River and explore Yangshuo.                                          |
